title: potentilla × adscendens
intro: Potentilla × adscendens, also known as the sticky cinquefoil, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and is a hybrid of Potentilla erecta and Potentilla norvegica. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potent medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Potentilla × adscendens include reducing inflammation and soothing skin irritations, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions.
